Smart Wearable Housing Prototype for Consumer Product Development

wearable housing / appearance review / internal fit check

IndustriesConsumer Products
Part Functionwearable housing / appearance review / internal fit check
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, fine surface finishing, small features and appearance inspection

Project Scenario

The wearable housing prototype focused on appearance, hand feel and internal fit before later engineering validation.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The samples provided visible and dimensional feedback for the next enclosure design iteration.
